title: Tools for a smoke-free life (Video 3) - Canada.ca
content:
## Tools for a smoke-free life (Video 1)
With described video

## Transcript - Tools for a smoke-free life (Video 1)
Uplifting music starts
Text on screen: Combining the right tools and support can nearly triple your chances of quitting smoking.
Text on screen: I quit with counselling & varenicline medication
Text on screen: I quit with the patch & nicotine gum
Text on screen: Explore your options.
Text on screen: Canada.ca/quit-smoking
Government of Canada identifier
